user_feedback:
voxel_world.js:60 Uncaught ReferenceError: seedrandom is not defined
    at VoxelWorld.generateTerrain (voxel_world.js:60:19)
    at new VoxelWorld (voxel_world.js:20:14)
    at startGame (game.js:87:28)
    at game.js:102:50
analysis:
- Issue identified: The code in `voxel_world.js` attempts to access `seedrandom` as a global variable (constructor), but the library included in `index.html` attaches itself to `Math.seedrandom`. Since `seedrandom` is not defined in the global scope (or the module scope), a `ReferenceError` occurs.
- Files affected: `voxel_world.js`
- Changes needed: Update `voxel_world.js` to use `new Math.seedrandom('voxel_seed')` instead of `new seedrandom('voxel_seed')`.
